chapter_title.ar: بَابُ الْمُحْرِمِ يُضْطَرُّ إِلَى مَا لَا يَجُوزُ لَهُ لُبْسُهُ
chapter_title.en: Chapter 86 – The one in Ihraam is desperate to what is not allowed for him to wear

gradings: Allamah Baqir al-Majlisi: ضعيف على المشهور - Mir‘at al ‘Uqul Fi Sharh Akhbar Al al Rasul (17/296)
Allamah Baqir al-Majlisi: ضعيف على المشهور - Mir‘at al ‘Uqul Fi Sharh Akhbar Al al Rasul (17/296)
text: سَأَلْتُهُ عَنِ الْمُحْرِمِ يَلْبَسُ الْخُفَّيْنِ وَ الْجَوْرَبَيْنِ قَالَ إِذَا اضْطُرَّ إِلَيْهِمَا .

en.hubeali: A number of our companions, from Sahl Bin Ziyad, from Ahmad Bin Muhammad, from Rafa’at,
(It has been narrated) from Abu Abdullahasws, said, ‘I asked himasws about the one in Ihraam wearing the two shoes and the two socks. Heasws said: ‘When he is desperate for these two’.
en.sarwar: 2. A number of our people have narrated from Sahl ibn Ziyad Ahmad ibn Muhammad from Rifa’ah who has said the following: “I once asked abu ’Abd Allah, ‘Alayhi al-Salam, about a man who in the state of Ihram wears shoes and socks. He (the Imam) said, ‘He can do so in case it is an emergency. ‘“
